front: How does epigenomics influence peptide hormone expression?
back: Epigenetic modifications (DNA methylation, histone acetylation, chromatin remodeling) regulate accessibility of peptide hormone genes. Examples: 1) Insulin gene methylation in diabetes, 2) POMC gene regulation in stress response, 3) Ghrelin gene epigenetics in obesity. Epigenetic drugs can modulate peptide expression.
